skills.name: Battle Orders
skills.description: Order the ally to get ready for battle.
skills.effect_text:
Consume 1% of the SP per second
Final Damage + CaptionRatio %

skills.name: Mortal Slash
skills.description: Gather the uplifted energy and attack by slashing the sword to the front.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 4
AoE Attack Ratio SkillSR
30% of the shield's Physical Defense added to the Physical Attack
Uplift Lv.1: Damage increases by 20% and ignore Defense by 15%
Uplift Lv.2: Damage increases by 60% and ignore Defense by 20%
Uplift Lv.3: Damage increases by 100% and ignore Defense by 25%

skills.name: Advanced Orders
skills.effect_text:
Consume 1% of the SP per second
Movement Speed + CaptionRatio2
Damage received - CaptionRatio %
Number of [Advanced Orders: Bind] targets: CaptionRatio3

skills.name: Flag of Morale
skills.description: Summon a Flag and raise the morale of the allies. The minimum Critical Rate of the allies within the range increases.
skills.effect_text:
Duration: 30 seconds
Ally's Minimum Critical Chance + CaptionRatio %

skills.name: Flag of Vitality
skills.description: Summon a Flag and boosts the allies. Recovers HP of the allies within the range at a certain interval.
skills.effect_text:
Duration: CaptionTime second(s)
HP Recovery: CaptionRatio % per 2 seconds

skills.name: Flag of Revenge
skills.description: Summon a Flag and lower the morale of the enemies. Enemies within the range receive continuous damage.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Duration: 30 seconds
Targets: CaptionRatio

skills.name: Mortal Wave
skills.description: Gather the uplifted energy and attack the enemy in the frontal line by slashing the sword to the front.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 7
AoE Attack Ratio SkillSR
Uplift Lv.1: Damage +50%
Uplift Lv.2: Damage +50% and attack range x2
Uplift Lv.3: Damage +50% and attack range x3

skills.name: Retribution
skills.description: Gather the uplifted energy and summon an ancient defender. This Gives AoE damage to the enemies within range.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 5 times
Number of Targets CaptionRatio
Uplift Lv.1: Damage +20%
Uplift Lv.2: Damage +60%
Uplift Lv.3: Damage +100% and 2 seconds of Stun applied

attributes.name: Mortal Slash: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Mortal Slash] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Battle Orders: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Battle Orders]'s final damage increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Plate Mastery: Divine
attributes.description:
* While equipped with 4 pieces of [Plate] armor, reduces Physical and Magic damage taken by 5% and decreases damage taken from [Holy] property attacks by 30%.

* Cannot be used simultaneously with [Arts] Leather Mastery: Animal Instinct

attributes.name: [Arts] Mortal Slash: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Mortal Slash] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Advanced Orders: Bind
attributes.description:
* Decreases Movement Speed of the enemies within the range while [Advanced Orders] is activated

* The value of the Movement Speed decreased is equal to the value of Allies' Movement Speed increased at the current level

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

* The decreased Movement Speed lasts for 3 seconds

attributes.name: Advanced Orders: Unity
attributes.description: * Increase the Evasion of allies instead of the Movement Speed by [skill level x 2]% when [Advanced Orders] is activated

attributes.name: Advanced Orders: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases 'decrease in damage received by ally' effect by 0.5% per attribute level in [Advanced Orders] status

* Additional 10% increases at maximum level

attributes.name: Flag of Morale: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Flag of Morale]'s 'increase in ally's minimum critical rate' effect by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Flag of Revenge: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Flag of Revenge] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Mortal Wave: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Mortal Wave] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Retribution: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Retribution] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Mortal Wave: Jab
attributes.description:
* The number of [Mortal Wave]'s hit and the number of targets is fixed to 1

* Damage is now increased by 50%/100%/150% per Uplift level

attributes.name: [Arts] Retribution: Retention
attributes.description:
* Leaves retention energy where the skill is cast for 10 seconds when casting [Retribution]

* Enemies over the retention energy receive damage equal to 10% of [Retribution] skill damage every 1 second

* Retention Energy duration: 10 seconds

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: [Arts] Flag of Revenge: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Flag of Revenge] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Mortal Wave: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Mortal Wave] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Retribution: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Retribution] by 1.25% per attribute level
